Sl. 25. If Mercury and Venus are Ohurdhura Yoga Kartas. he will speak
loving words. will be extremety lucky. handsome. fond of dance,
song. drama and other fine arts. will be respected by many, will
be heroic and a minister.
Sl. 26. If Mercury and Saturn are Ohurdhura Yoga Kartas. he will go
from one country to another in pursuit of wealth. wil not be
very talented, will be inimical to relatives, OOt win be respected
boy strangers and foreigners.
Sl. 27. If Jupiter and Venus are Ohurdhura Yoga Kartas. he will be
oourageous. patient. polite, will have a good knowledge of

and will do acts like a king.
51. 28. If Jupiter and Satum are Ohurdhura Yoga Kartas. the native will
have magnanimous and noble character and knowledge, will
speak loving words. will be teamed. will hold responsible posts,
